title: Sauerbraten with Robust Caramelized Onions
description: A traditional German pot roast dish marinated in vinegar and spices, served with robust caramelized onions and a side of leafy greens.
instructions: 2. In a large Dutch oven, combine the beef pot roast, onion, apple cider vinegar, brown sugar, robust, norwegian, salt, and black pepper.
3. Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
4. Roast the pot roast for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until it is tender and easily shreds with a fork.
5. Remove the pot roast from the oven and let it rest for 15 minutes before slicing.
6. Serve the sliced pot roast with the robust caramelized onions and a side of leafy greens.
